nodes.name: Prepare Query
nodes.notes: Accepts { question, limit? } or one Telegram getUpdates item. Telegram commands /ask, /answer, and /query are stripped.

nodes.name: Build OpenRouter Answer Request
nodes.notes: Calls OpenRouter through an OpenAI-compatible chat completion request. Set OPENROUTER_API_KEY and optionally OPENROUTER_MODEL and LLM_API_KEY_HEADER in n8n.

nodes.name: Call OpenRouter Answer
nodes.notes: Calls the LLM API with a dynamic API-key header. LLM_API_KEY_HEADER defaults to Authorization; non-Authorization headers receive the raw OPENROUTER_API_KEY value.

nodes.name: Build OpenRouter Feedback Request
nodes.notes: Produces a proposed Feedback Record. The workflow validates it but does not apply wiki changes.

nodes.name: Call OpenRouter Feedback
nodes.notes: Calls the LLM API with a dynamic API-key header. LLM_API_KEY_HEADER defaults to Authorization; non-Authorization headers receive the raw OPENROUTER_API_KEY value.

nodes.name: Validate feedback-record.ts
nodes.notes: Validates the proposed Feedback Record without writing state/feedback or mutating wiki.

nodes.name: Build Telegram Answer Log
nodes.notes: Builds a Telegram answer log. It keeps the main answer response intact and only sends when Telegram env/chat id is present.

nodes.name: Send Telegram Answer Log
nodes.notes: Sends a plain-text Telegram message through Bot API. Requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and a chat id.

nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Polls Telegram once per minute. getUpdates does not require public inbound access to n8n.

nodes.name: Build Telegram Poll Request
nodes.notes: Builds a Telegram Bot API getUpdates request using workflow static data as the offset store.

nodes.name: Should Poll Telegram?
nodes.notes: Skips polling when the Telegram bot token is not available to the Code node runtime.

nodes.name: Call Telegram getUpdates
nodes.notes: Uses outbound polling, so n8n does not need to be reachable from the public internet. Delete any Telegram webhook for this bot first.

nodes.name: Prepare Telegram Updates
nodes.notes: Routes one valid Telegram update. Supported bot tasks acquire an explicit filesystem lock before answer or ingest work starts; offset=-1 drops old backlog on first poll.

nodes.name: Is Telegram Ingest Command?
nodes.notes: Routes /ingest commands to the YouTube ingestion branch. /ask, /answer, /query, and free text continue to the answer branch.

nodes.name: Prepare YouTube Ingest Request
nodes.notes: Extracts the URL from /ingest <url> and builds the youtube-transcript.ts payload.

nodes.name: Should Extract YouTube Transcript?
nodes.notes: Skips extraction and logs usage errors when the /ingest command does not include a URL.

nodes.name: Run youtube-transcript.ts
nodes.notes: Calls youtube-transcript.ts, which delegates YouTube subtitle metadata and subtitle download to yt-dlp, then writes a raw/web markdown artifact. Expected no-caption failures return JSON with status=failed.

nodes.name: Should Ingest YouTube Transcript?
nodes.notes: Only the created raw transcript path continues into the normal ingest pipeline.

nodes.name: Build Telegram Ingest Failure Log
nodes.notes: Builds a Telegram log for /ingest failures such as missing URL or no YouTube captions.

nodes.name: Should Send Telegram Ingest Failure Log?
Run plan-source-note.ts
nodes.notes: Creates the source note and root index Mutation Plan. In the n8n ingest flow its input is the mandatory LLM-cleaned source_note payload.

nodes.name: Build OpenRouter Ingest Plan Request
nodes.notes: Produces an optional richer ingest Mutation Plan. The workflow validates and auto-applies non-empty plans with guardrails.

nodes.name: Call OpenRouter Ingest Planner
nodes.notes: Calls the LLM API with a dynamic API-key header. LLM_API_KEY_HEADER defaults to Authorization; non-Authorization headers receive the raw OPENROUTER_API_KEY value.

parameters.jsCode:
const llmApplied = Boolean($json.llm_mutation_result);
const rawEvent = $node['Normalize Raw Event'].json ?? {};
return [{
  json: {
    status: llmApplied ? 'baseline_ingest_applied_llm_plan_applied' : 'baseline_ingest_applied_no_llm_changes',
    source_payload: $json.source_payload,
    baseline_mutation_plan: $json.baseline_mutation_plan,
    baseline_mutation_result: $json.baseline_mutation_result,
    baseline_reindex_result: $json.baseline_reindex_result,
    baseline_commit_result: $json.baseline_commit_result,
    openrouter_source_note_meta: $json.openrouter_source_note_meta,
    llm_mutation_plan: $json.llm_mutation_plan,
    llm_guardrail_rejections: $json.llm_guardrail_rejections ?? [],
    llm_plan_approval_required: $json.llm_plan_approval_required,
    llm_plan_auto_apply_required: $json.llm_plan_auto_apply_required,
    llm_mutation_result: $json.llm_mutation_result ?? null,
    llm_reindex_result: $json.llm_reindex_result ?? null,
    llm_commit_result: $json.llm_commit_result ?? null,
    openrouter_ingest_meta: $json.openrouter_ingest_meta,
    telegram_chat_id: rawEvent.telegram_chat_id ?? null,
    telegram_message_id: rawEvent.telegram_message_id ?? null,
    telegram_update_id: rawEvent.telegram_update_id ?? null,
    telegram_command: rawEvent.telegram_command ?? null,
    telegram_lock_acquired: Boolean(rawEvent.telegram_lock_acquired),
    telegram_lock_id: rawEvent.telegram_lock_id ?? null,
    youtube_ingest_url: rawEvent.youtube_ingest_url ?? null,
    youtube_transcript_result: rawEvent.youtube_transcript_result ?? null
  }
}];

nodes.name: Build OpenRouter Source Note Request
nodes.notes: Builds the mandatory OpenRouter request that cleans the source content for the wiki/sources note before any wiki mutation.

nodes.name: Call OpenRouter Source Note Cleaner
nodes.notes: Calls the LLM API with a dynamic API-key header. LLM_API_KEY_HEADER defaults to Authorization; non-Authorization headers receive the raw OPENROUTER_API_KEY value.

nodes.name: Parse LLM Source Note
nodes.notes: Validates the mandatory cleaned source-note JSON. Invalid or empty responses fail ingestion before wiki mutation.

nodes.name: Build Telegram Ingest Log
nodes.notes: Builds a plain-text Telegram ingest log after the ingest response is available.

nodes.name: Send Telegram Ingest Log
nodes.notes: Sends a plain-text Telegram message through Bot API. Requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and a chat id.

nodes.name: Acquire Bot Lock
nodes.notes: Uses bot-lock.ts to acquire an atomic filesystem lock under state/locks. If another task is running, the update is left unprocessed for a later poll.

nodes.name: Release Bot Lock After Answer
nodes.notes: Releases the filesystem bot lock after the workflow has marked the Telegram update as processed.

nodes.name: Release Bot Lock After Ingest Failure
nodes.notes: Releases the filesystem bot lock after the workflow has marked the Telegram update as processed.

nodes.name: Release Bot Lock After Ingest
nodes.notes: Releases the filesystem bot lock after the workflow has marked the Telegram update as processed.

main.node: Should Send Telegram Ingest Failure Log?
Release Bot Lock After Ingest Failure
